repositories.name: Filoppi/Luma-Framework
repositories.description: Luma is DX11 games modding framework based on the ReShade Addon system. Multiple mods are currently included, the biggest one being Prey (2017), which refactors its post processing rendering phase (e.g. adding HDR support, DLSS). Mod list here: https://github.com/Filoppi/Luma-Framework/wiki/Mods-List
